summary: Implemented optional project dates with a backend schema/migration and frontend calendar handling for undated projects, and added PDF thumbnail rendering via a new PDFThumbnail component plus global PDF.js initialization. Roadmap appears to include cost-items editing UI wiring. Media deletion backend API implementation is not evidenced in the provided diff summary.

missing_requirements.requirement: Fix Media deletion by implementing a backend `deleteMedia` API and wiring the frontend mutation to it so users can reliably delete images and PDFs without runtime errors (including deleting the stored blob content).
missing_requirements.reason: The diff summary does not show any backend `deleteMedia` (or equivalent) method being added/modified in `backend/main.mo`, and the frontend summary indicates the mutation calls `actor.deleteUserMedia` (not `deleteMedia`). There is also no evidence shown that blob content is removed on deletion.

hallucinated_features.description: Added a persistent localStorage-based PDF thumbnail cache with hashing and quota-management logic.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-2 asks for correct and consistent PDF first-page thumbnails with fallback/error handling, but does not request persistent caching or localStorage management.

hallucinated_features.description: Added/mentioned navigation wiring and a new Kostenübersicht page/route in the App layout/routing.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-3 requires that cost-item edits sync with the existing Kostenübersicht page, but does not request adding a new Kostenübersicht page/route or new navigation behavior.
evidence: frontend-file-summaries.txt (App.tsx mentions routing including the new Kostenübersicht page)
frontend-file-summaries.txt (AppLayout.tsx mentions navigation including new Kostenübersicht page)
